unknownMessage.defaultMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

networkMessage.defaultMessage: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.

rateLimitMessage.defaultMessage: Please wait {seconds} seconds before trying again.

authMessage.defaultMessage: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

forbiddenMessage.defaultMessage: You do not have permission for this action.

notFoundMessage.defaultMessage: The requested resource was not found.

validationMessage.defaultMessage: Invalid input. Please check your data.

serverMessage.defaultMessage: The server encountered an error. Please try again later.

requestFailedMessage.defaultMessage: An error occurred while processing your request.
